input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.12.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.12.6
            TITLE: for sleeved butt joints, the sleeve must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.12.6: For Sleeved Butt Joints, the sleeve must:
F.5.12.6 For Sleeved Butt Joints, the sleeve must: 
a. Have a minimum length of 75 mm; 37.5 mm to each side of the joint 
b. Be external to the base tubes, with a close fit around the base tubes.  
c. Have a wall thickness of 2.0 mm or more

final_answer: F.5.12.6 For Sleeved Butt Joints, the sleeve must: a. Have a minimum length of 75 mm; 37.5 mm to each side of the joint b. Be external to the base tubes, with a close fit around the base tubes. c. Have a wall thickness of 2.0 mm or more
